THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE, FOR THE BENEFIT OF HARBORVIEW 2005-2 TRUST FUND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW, JOSEPH S. DOES I THRU X, INCL. NEW, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 219 DE LONG STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXHIBIT LIST FILED

COURT TRIAL ON JUL-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF PUTS ON A WITNESS AND OFFERS EXHIBITS INTO EVIDENCE. COURT RENDERS A JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES ONLY. THE JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE MASSULLO, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D306
